suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Avoid hard-coding `supabase db execute` in mission/worker procedures without checking installed CLI capabilities; document a supported fallback (Management API or SQL editor path).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `supabase-schema-setup` reported the installed Supabase CLI lacked `db execute`, requiring a Management API fallback despite successful schema completion.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that current Next.js in this environment uses `proxy.ts` (not legacy `middleware.ts`) for request interception to reduce implementation drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `auth-magic-link-flow` implemented `src/proxy.ts` and noted deprecation drift between legacy naming and current Next.js conventions.
